name: Frightfully Easy Ghost Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan, melt the candy coating over low heat, stirring constantly until smooth.
2. Line cookie sheets with waxed paper. Holding each cookie with tongs, dip entirely top and side into melted coating, letting excess drip off. Place flat, coated side up on waxed paper-lined cookie sheets. Add two chocolate chips to form eyes. Allow to set for 10 minutes.
- 32 cookies
